overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the neon-lit streets of Night City. The player character navigates orange-textured sidewalks, crosses wet streets with futuristic traffic, passes through a security checkpoint with red neon bars, and walks under overpasses in the Vista Del Rey district.

events.description: crossing yellow striped crosswalk onto orange textured pedestrian walkway
futuristic black sedan with headlights on passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange textured sidewalk, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the wet street with bright headlights

dark wet road surface reflecting neon lights from buildings

tall street light with glowing lamp illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a crossing of a yellow-striped crosswalk onto a distinctive orange textured sidewalk. The camera moves along a wide futuristic city street at night, with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights from towering buildings. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the right while pedestrians walk along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with red neon gate and metal fencing

events.description: approaching security checkpoint with vertical red neon light bars
passing through the security gate with red neon vertical bars

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing through a security checkpoint gate with red neon lighting

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket walking in opposite direction past the camera

entered.detail: metal gate structure with vertical glowing red neon bars
tall metal security fencing with vertical bars running along the sidewalk
horizontal blue neon light strips mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a security checkpoint characterized by vertical red neon light bars and metal fencing. The environment shifts to a semi-covered layout as the character passes through the gate. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions while futuristic vehicles continue to pass on the wet street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with parked vehicles and neon signage

events.description: entering covered area under overpass with reduced ambient light and artificial neon illumination
turning left at corner near parked vehicles and building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered overpass section, passing parked cars and approaching a corner

notable_agents.action: person in red sleeveless top walking ahead on the orange sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass covering the street and walkway
bright yellow sports car parked along the curb
thick concrete support columns holding up the overpass structure
illuminated entrance to building with glass doors under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete overpass that blocks most of the sky, the scene becomes more enclosed with artificial neon lighting. The camera passes parked vehicles including a distinctive yellow car and concrete support pillars. The character approaches and turns a corner near a building entrance while following a pedestrian in a red top.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground overpass walkway with litter in Vista Del Rey district

events.description: entering Vista Del Rey district as indicated by on-screen location marker
walking through underpass section with scattered trash and newspapers on walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass in the Vista Del Rey district, navigating past groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic six-wheeled truck driving under the overpass with headlights on

entered.detail: solid concrete ceiling of the overpass blocking all sky visibility
scattered newspapers and debris covering the orange sidewalk
series of thick concrete support columns lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place entirely under the overpass in the Vista Del Rey district, with a solid concrete ceiling blocking all sky visibility. The orange walkway is littered with trash and newspapers. The camera continues forward through moderate crowds of pedestrians while futuristic vehicles drive past on the right. The environment feels more enclosed and industrial compared to the open streets earlier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the open, neon-lit streets of a futuristic city into the enclosed, industrial underbelly of the Vista Del Rey district. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk onto an orange textured sidewalk, moving alongside wet asphalt that reflects the glow of towering buildings and passing vehicles. As the camera advances, the environment shifts toward a security checkpoint marked by vertical red neon bars and metal fencing, transitioning from the open road into a semi-covered gateway. The scene then becomes increasingly confined as the camera passes under a massive concrete overpass, gliding past support pillars and a yellow car before turning a corner toward a building entrance. Finally, the view settles entirely beneath the solid concrete ceiling of the district, where the orange walkway is littered with trash and the atmosphere feels dense and industrial amidst crowds of pedestrians.
